title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/prompts.py (第 454 至 680 行，共 797 行) ---
 454 | def get_system_prompt(
 455 |     cwd: str = None,
 456 |     summary: str = "",
 457 |     plan: str = "",
 458 |     episodic_memories: Optional[List["SessionSummary"]] = None,
 459 |     session_summaries: Optional[List["SessionSummary"]] = None,
 460 |     long_term_memories: Optional[List["SessionSummary"]] = None,  # 🔥🔥🔥 新增：跨会话长期记忆
 461 |     completed_goals: Optional[List[Dict]] = None,
 462 |     user_input: str = ""  # 🔥 新增：用于 CLAUDE.md 按需注入
 463 | ) -> str:
 464 |     """
 465 |     组装动态系统提示词（优化版：减少 Token 消耗）
 466 | 
 467 |     优化策略：
 468 |     1. 记忆去重：检查情景记忆/会话摘要是否已被长期记忆覆盖
 469 |     2. 条件注入：根据长期记忆长度动态调整注入量
 470 |     3. 关键词化：已完成任务只注入关键词而非完整描述
 471 |     4. 格式压缩：环境信息压缩为单行
 472 |     5. 按需注入：CLAUDE.md 根据任务描述注入相关段落
 473 | 
 474 |     包含：
 475 |     1. 基础身份 (BASE_SYSTEM_PROMPT)
 476 |     2. s06: 历史摘要 (Summary)
 477 |     3. 🔥🔥🔥 跨会话长期记忆 (Long-term Memory) - 新增
 478 |     4. Phase 2/3: 情景记忆 (Episodic Memory) - 条件注入
 479 |     5. Phase 1: 会话摘要 (Session Summaries) - 条件注入
 480 |     6. s13: 当前执行计划 (Plan)
 481 |     7. 环境信息 (Env Info) - 压缩格式
 482 |     8. s05: 项目规范 (CLAUDE.md)
 483 |     """
 484 |     if cwd is None:
 485 |         cwd = os.getcwd()
 486 | 
 487 |     # --- s06: 注入压缩后的长期记忆 ---
 488 |     summary_section = ""
 489 |     if summary:
 490 |         summary_section = f"""
 491 |     ### 历史任务进展 (长期记忆):
 492 |     {summary}
 493 |     -----------------------------------
 494 |     """
 495 | 
 496 |     # --- 🔥🔥🔥 跨会话长期记忆注入 ---
 497 |     long_term_section = ""
 498 |     if long_term_memories:
 499 |         # 过滤已被长期摘要覆盖的条目
 500 |         filtered_long_term = [
 501 |             mem for mem in long_term_memories
 502 |             if not is_covered_by_summary(mem, summary)
 503 |         ]
 504 | 
 505 |         if filtered_long_term:
 506 |             long_term_section = "\n### 🔥 跨会话长期记忆 (所有会话共享):\n"
 507 |             long_term_section += "**提示**: 以下是从其他会话中检索到的相关历史记忆\n\n"
 508 | 
 509 |             for i, mem in enumerate(filtered_long_term[:5], 1):  # 最多 5 条
 510 |                 timestamp = mem.timestamp[:10] if mem.timestamp else "未知"
 511 |                 status_icon = "✅" if mem.task_status == "completed" else "⏳"
 512 |                 long_term_section += f"{i}. {status_icon} [{timestamp}] {mem.task_goal}\n"
 513 |                 long_term_section += f"   摘要: {mem.summary_text[:100]}...\n\n"
 514 | 
 515 |             long_term_section += "-----------------------------------\n"
 516 | 
 517 |     # --- Phase 2/3: 注入情景记忆（条件注入 + 去重）---
 518 |     episodic_section = ""
 519 |     if episodic_memories:
 520 |         # 优化：条件注入策略
 521 |         should_inject, max_episodic = should_inject_episodic(summary)
 522 | 
 523 |         if should_inject:
 524 |             # 优化：去重 - 过滤已被长期记忆覆盖的条目
 525 |             filtered_memories = [
 526 |                 mem for mem in episodic_memories
 527 |                 if not is_covered_by_summary(mem, summary)
 528 |             ]
 529 | 
 530 |             # 限制注入数量
 531 |             filtered_memories = filtered_memories[:max_episodic]
 532 | 
 533 |             if filtered_memories:
 534 |                 episodic_section = format_episodic_memory(filtered_memories, max_items=len(filtered_memories))
 535 |                 if episodic_section:
 536 |                     episodic_section += "\n-----------------------------------\n"
 537 | 
 538 |     # --- Phase 1: 注入会话摘要（条件注入 + 去重）---
 539 |     session_section = ""
 540 |     if session_summaries:
 541 |         # 优化：条件注入策略
 542 |         episodic_count = len(episodic_memories) if episodic_memories else 0
 543 |         should_inject, max_session = should_inject_session(summary, episodic_count)
 544 | 
 545 |         if should_inject:
 546 |             # 优化：去重 - 过滤已被长期记忆覆盖的条目
 547 |             filtered_summaries = [
 548 |                 s for s in session_summaries
 549 |                 if not is_covered_by_summary(s, summary)
 550 |             ]
 551...
